content.body:
- adapter tests: remove Profile usage, update GenerateContextFile calls
- claude_test: add NoProfile (forbidden phrases), CommunicationModes tests
- init_test: remove retired file expectations, add retired-must-not-exist check
- onboarding_test: remove DefaultProfile assertions, remove profiles import,
  fix form input sequences for one-fewer-group wizard
- upgrade_test: replace PreservesCustomProfile+MigratesGeneralistProfile with
  RemovesProfilesDir, RemovesRetiredConstraints, Idempotent, NoRetiredContent

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: test: update all tests for v0.8.0 profile/orchestration retirement
